summary: Art/creative website project with an admin panel (accessible by tapping the logo) for editing/uploading images and text, WhatsApp link, and Instagram profile integration.
architectural_notes: Admin panel is hidden by default and accessed by tapping the site logo
Admin panel must support image upload/edit for all site images and artist images, plus text editing
known_issues: Instagram link opens generic Instagram instead of the specific profile (khudrangkalakaar)

existing_features.title: Make the admin panel accessible by tapping/clicking the site logo in the Navigation and Footer components. When the logo is clicked, trigger the Internet Identity login flow (if not already authenticated) and redirect to the /admin route upon successful authentication. The logo should not visually indicate admin access to regular visitors.

Ensure the AdminPanel page (/admin route) provides full editing capabilities: upload/replace the site logo, upload/replace the hero cover image, upload/replace the artist portrait image used in the About section, add/edit/delete artworks in the gallery, and edit key text content (artist name, tagline, bio). All changes must persist to the backend.

Fix the Instagram link in the ContactSection (and anywhere else it appears on the site) so it opens the specific Instagram profile page: https://www.instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar?igsh=bmRsdGx6Z3Nrd2Vy — not the generic Instagram homepage.

new_feature_requests.summary: Admin panel accessible by tapping the logo — allows editing/uploading all images including artist images and editing text
Fix Instagram link to open the specific profile page: https://www.instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar?igsh=bmRsdGx6Z3Nrd2Vy
